title: MCEF2
description: A library for embedding Chromium into the Minecraft.
body:
# **The Mcef2** This mod is a library that embeds JCEF browser into the Minecraft.
Current Chromium version: 141.0.7390.123. ## Features - Automatically download JCef through fast mirror servers. - Pressing F10 can open a in-game web broswer. - Just provide APIs for other mods. ## Platforms - Windows x86 x64 arm64 - Linux x86 x64 arm64 arm - macosx x64 arm64 (Not tested)
Some antivirus software may prevent JCEF from initializing. You may have to disable your antivirus or whitelist the mod files for MCEF2 to work properly.
**This mod can NOT run on Android.**
